basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Patna Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Patna (AIIMS Patna)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) has published the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website at https://aiimspatna.edu.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 45 Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions. Candidates holding a Post Graduate Degree (MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent) in the relevant specialty recognized by NMC/NBE and aged up to 45 years (with applicable relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD) are eligible to apply online. The application process will be active until 14 July 2026, and candidates can access the detail

age_limit.age_details: Max 45 years (with relaxations for SC/ST, OBC, PwBD)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years OBC: 03 Years PwBD: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the above Department recognized by Medical Council of India / NMC/NBE.
qualification.details: All Posts: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the concerned Department recognized by Medical Council of India / NMC/NBE. Clinical Haematology: MD in General Medicine and MD in Paediatrics are also eligible to apply.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- as per 7th CPC, Level – 11 of the Matrix + NPA plus usual allowances as admissible.
salary_details.details: Rs. 67,700/- as per 7th CPC, Level – 11 of the Matrix + NPA plus usual allowances as admissible.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Patna to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Patna Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: All Posts: Post Graduate Degree i.e. MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or equivalent in the concerned Department recognized by Medical Council of India / NMC/NBE. Clinical Haematology: MD in General Medicine and MD in Paediatrics are also eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years OBC: 03 Years PwBD: 10 years

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Patna Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 67,700/- as per 7th CPC, Level – 11 of the Matrix + NPA plus usual allowances as admissible.

rows.event: Online filling of application form on AIIMS Patna website
Publication of provisional eligibility list on AIIMS Patna website
Submission of grievance/objections on AIIMS Patna website
Publication of final eligibility list on AIIMS Patna website
Hosting of Admit Card on AIIMS Patna website
Date of written (MCQ Based) Examination (Reporting Time)
Declaration of list of candidates qualified for Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Patna to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Patna Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts at AIIMS Patna is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree such as MD/MS/DNB/DM/M.Ch or an equivalent qualification recognized by the Medical Council of India/NMC/NBE in the respective department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and PwBD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: AIIMS Patna has announced a total of 45 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions across various departments.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1500/- plus applicable transaction charges.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fee exemptions?
faq.answer: Yes, Ex-servicemen, Women, and PwBD candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test (MCQ based) followed by a personal interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 67,700/- per month as per the 7th CPC, Level – 11 of the Matrix, plus NPA and other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with MD in General Medicine or Paediatrics apply for Clinical Haematology?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates holding an MD in General Medicine or MD in Paediatrics are also eligible to apply for the Clinical Haematology post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found on the AIIMS Patna official website. Please refer to the 'Important Links' section for direct access.
